rationale: Lockfile-only change in pnpm-lock.yaml bumping qs from 6.15.0 to 6.15.2 along both the package definition and the url@0.11.4 dependency edge, with corresponding integrity hash updates. The PR body documents the transitive path (vite-plugin-node-polyfills → node-stdlib-browser → url@0.11.4 → qs) and the CVE motivation. The diff matches the described scope exactly — no application source changes, no manifest edits, just the four expected lines. Closed-without-merge but the change itself is a clean version bump; the PR body discloses the firewall block on dependabot API access so the rejection may be procedural (maintainer wants to verify the CVE independently).
